description: Negative-offset twin of the non-UTC boundary fixture: a UTC-5 user reviewing at 23:30 local on June 10 (= 2026-06-11T04:30Z). The UTC day is already June 11; folding by UTC would push the due date a day LATE. Also exercises the 180-day interval ceiling and the 3.0 ease ceiling.

reviews.comment: 23:30 local 2026-06-10 at UTC-5. interval 90 * 2.5 = 225, clamped to 180; ease 2.95 + 0.1 clamped to 3.0; due = local June 10 + 180d = Dec 7.
